reviews.comment:
La estacion tiene un estado horrible de limpieza, la atencion es paupérrima, muy lentos, poco entusiasmó y esa misma actitud patética proboca retrasos y problemas hasta de trabsito coml ven en la foto, pudiendo provocar accidentes, desde ya y lo digo y prometi aca, asi ae que me quede sen nafta en la puerta, yo no cargo nunca mas en esa estacion y la verdad que enninguna del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The station is in a horrible state of cleanliness, the service is abysmal, very slow, unenthusiastic, and that same pathetic attitude causes delays and even traffic problems, as you can see in the photo, potentially leading to accidents. I'm saying this now, and I promised here, so even though I ran out of gas at the door, I will never fill up at that station again, and honestly, not at any ACA station either.
